title: SpaceX 已向 SEC 递交保密 IPO 申请，承销商名单曝光
summary: 知情人士透露，SpaceX 于 4 月 1 日正式提交保密 IPO 申请，高盛与摩根士丹利担任联席主承销商，目标估值区间 $3500 亿–$4000 亿美元，S-1 最快 5 月初公开。

title: Binance launches SpaceX-linked perpetual futures ahead of IPO
summary: The crypto exchange's new pre-IPO futures product lets traders speculate on SpaceX’s expected public market valuation before the company begins trading on public exchanges.

title: Forget ‘TechnoKing’: Elon Musk will really be king at SpaceX
summary: Musk, who will have more than 50% of the voting power, will have a monarchical grip over the publicly-traded version of SpaceX — control that goes far beyond what other tech founders enjoy.

title: Blockchain.com confidentially submits IPO filing with SEC
summary: The crypto services company began the US IPO process as companies across the digital asset sector weigh public market debuts.

title: Crypto Exchange Blockchain.com Files for IPO in the US
summary: Long-running crypto exchange Blockchain.com has confidentially filed to take its business public via the U.S. markets.

title: HYPE Jumps Double Digits as Hyperliquid ETFs Add $25.5M
summary: Hyperliquid’s HYPE logged double-digit gains on the day, as ETF demand outpaced the token's supply reduction mechanism.

title: Tax evaders are trying ‘novel digital assets’ to dodge authorities: Chainalysis
summary: Italian authorities uncovered a tax evasion scheme in which an individual allegedly used Bitcoin Ordinals and the BRC-20 token standard to generate and conceal $1.1 million.
